text: A small child standing next to a small horse eating hay.
The open umbrella is on a beach at sunset.
A small cake has strawberries and chocolate on top and ice cream beside it.
An small college dorm sized refrigerator with the door ajar.
A person holding up a smart phone in their hands.
People are cross country skiing on a trail through a forest of huge pine trees.
A flock of birds flying in the air over a beach.
Two giraffes that are walking together in a field.
A man with dark sunglasses is talking on a cell phone.
Giraffes are wandering around on a field with a camper in the background.
